subject: Need VPN access re-provisioned after laptop replacement
body: My laptop was replaced last week and I can no longer connect to the company VPN. I need this fixed today, I have a client call this afternoon.

subject: New contractor onboarding - paperwork and accounts
body: We have a new contractor starting Monday. Need their email, CRM login, and standard software licenses set up before then.

subject: Invoice #4471 shows wrong billing address
body: Client noticed the billing address on invoice 4471 is our old office address. Can someone correct and resend?

subject: Shared drive permissions error
body: I'm getting 'access denied' on the shared project drive since this morning, nothing changed on my end that I know of.

subject: Annual CRM license renewal due next week
body: Just a heads up that our CRM seat licenses renew next week, want to confirm someone is on top of the renewal so we don't lose access.
